articles.title: What can players and clubs do about 'AI slop'?
articles.summary: There is an exponential growth of AI 'slop' involving players and football clubs. Is there anything that can be done to stop it?

articles.title: Was Chermiti's overhead kick best Old Firm goal this century?
articles.summary: Is Youssef Chermiti's overhead kick for Rangers against Celtic the best of the 2000s so far? Or do some of the other strikes in the fixture get your vote?

articles.title: Quiz: Name every team who has played in the Premier League
articles.summary: Fifty-one teams have played in at least one Premier League season, but can you name them all? Good luck!

articles.title: 'They look all over the shop' - Hart
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundits Leon Osman and Joe Hart look at how Tottenham Hotspur's disorganisation played a big part in their 2-1 defeat against Fulham.

articles.title: Important goals and big saves: Who were the weekend's difference makers?
articles.summary: Matchweek 28 gave us heroics by the bucketload. Sky Sports picks out the peak Premier League performers who produced the standout moments.

articles.title: 'Ugly' or 'beautiful'? Set-pieces prove decisive for Arsenal again
articles.summary: Arsenal move five points clear in the Premier League title race but is their reliance on set-pieces an issue?

articles.title: Tudor fury at 'home referee' as Spurs left in 'big emergency'
articles.summary: Without a win in 10 Premier League matches – their worst league run in 22 years – Tottenham are facing a battle to stay up.

articles.title: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
articles.summary: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?

articles.title: Arsenal beat 10-man Chelsea to extend lead
articles.summary: Arsenal get an important win in the title race against Chelsea, who had Pedro Neto sent off for a second yellow in a game with three goals scored from corners.

articles.title: Sesko leads Man Utd to victory against 10-man Crystal Palace
articles.summary: Benjamin Sesko scores his sixth goal in eight games to help Manchester United secure a comeback victory against Crystal Palace and move up to third in the Premier League.

articles.title: Fulham sink struggling Spurs with incredible Iwobi goal
articles.summary: Alex Iwobi scores a beautifully-placed goal as Fulham hold off late pressure from Tottenham Hotspur to win 2-1.

articles.title: Forest fall to defeat at Brighton despite Gibbs-White stunner
articles.summary: Brighton beat Nottingham Forest as Danny Welbeck scored his 10th goal of the season, to claim back-to-back wins for the first time since November.

articles.title: Referee halts La Liga game under racism protocol
articles.summary: Sunday's La Liga match between Elche and Espanyol is paused for three minutes after the referee instigates Uefa's racism protocol.

articles.title: 'It's cultural' - red cards and set-pieces wrecking Chelsea's season
articles.summary: Two set‑piece goals and a red card tell a familiar story for Chelsea, now six points adrift of the Premier League's top four and down to sixth in the table.

articles.title: Forest 'focusing on the present' - but will they stay up?
articles.summary: As Nottingham Forest balance Europa League football with a relegation battle, how likely is it that they will stay above the bottom three and survive this season?
